commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 09 Jul

The NYSE maintains clear liquidity dominance with an ILLIQ of 0.0013 and Roll spread of 1.0752%, reflecting deep order books and tight execution costs. Conversely, the London Stock Exchange trails significantly with ILLIQ of 0.1555—over 100 times higher—and the widest AR spread at 0.8574%. The transatlantic gap underscores structural differences in trading volumes and market depth, with European bourses occupying the middle tier.
